content:
Introducing the NVIDIA RTX Spark™ Superchip. The fusion of NVIDIA AI and RTX graphics in a single chip redefines Windows PCs and delivers amazing creating, AI development, and gaming—on the slimmest, most beautiful RTX laptops ever and small, ultra-efficient desktops.

CUDA, the software that accelerates the world’s AI, runs natively on RTX Spark.

The most power-efficient RTX chip ever made, in a chassis so slim you'll forget you’re carrying it.

Make a million ideas happen with hundreds of creative apps and AI tools supercharged by RTX and NVIDIA Studio tools.

Play the latest and greatest games with world-leading gaming tech. Ray-traced worlds, the full DLSS suite, NVIDIA Reflex, and G-SYNC.

Your PC Just Went From Tool to Teammate

Welcome to the PC where agents work alongside you—running tasks, generating assets, writing code, on demand. You set the objective. The machine handles the rest. There’s intelligence on both sides of the keyboard now.

Every creative workflow gets its own accelerator. FP4 Tensor Cores and unified memory for the latest models. RT Cores plus DLSS for real-time 3D renders. 4:2:2 hardware encode and decode for native, color-accurate timelines. AV1 encoders and NVIDIA Broadcast for sharper streams and cleaner audio.

The same NVIDIA CUDA® stack the world’s AI is built on, so you can develop and prototype on the same machine. And with up to 128 GB of unified memory, you can prototype, fine-tune, and inference on the latest models locally.

Experience the latest and greatest games with RTX. Ray-traced lighting for incredible immersion. The full suite of DLSS technologies. Game-winning responsiveness with NVIDIA Reflex . The hardware that defined modern PC gaming, ready to play.

Over 1,000 Accelerated Apps and Games, Millions of Ways to Use Them

RTX brings you exclusive features and the latest advancements in AI, simulation, and ray tracing. Experience incredible 3D performance, smoother video editing, photorealistic simulations, and stunning visuals in the apps, AI tools, and games that pros, creators, and gamers use every day.

Get RTX Spark in a small, ultra-efficient desktop. Built to run personal AI agents 24/7 right at your desk plus game and create with the full power of RTX graphics.
chineseContent:
隆重推出 NVIDIA RTX Spark™ 超级芯片。 NVIDIA AI 和 RTX 显卡在单芯片中的融合重新定义了 Windows PC，并在有史以来最薄、最漂亮的 RTX 笔记本电脑和小型、超高效的台式机上提供令人惊叹的创作、AI 开发和游戏。

CUDA 是一款加速全球人工智能发展的软件，在 RTX Spark 上本地运行。

有史以来最节能的 RTX 芯片，其机箱如此纤薄，您会忘记自己携带着它。

利用 RTX 和 NVIDIA Studio 工具增强的数百个创意应用程序和 AI 工具，实现一百万个想法。

使用世界领先的游戏技术玩最新、最棒的游戏。光线追踪世界、完整的 DLSS 套件、NVIDIA Reflex 和 G-SYNC。

您的电脑刚刚从工具变成了队友

欢迎使用代理与您一起工作的 PC——按需运行任务、生成资产、编写代码。你设定目标。机器会处理剩下的事情。现在键盘的两侧都有智能。

每个创意工作流程都有自己的加速器。最新型号的 FP4 Tensor Core 和统一内存。 RT 核心加上 DLSS，用于实时 3D 渲染。 4:2:2 硬件编码和解码，实现原生、色彩准确的时间线。 AV1 编码器和 NVIDIA Broadcast 可提供更清晰的流和更清晰的音频。

全球 AI 均基于相同的 NVIDIA CUDA® 堆栈，因此您可以在同一台机器上进行开发和原型设计。借助高达 128 GB 的统一内存，您可以在本地对最新模型进行原型设计、微调和推理。

使用 RTX 体验最新、最棒的游戏。光线追踪照明带来令人难以置信的沉浸感。全套 DLSS 技术。借助 NVIDIA Reflex 实现赢得游戏的响应能力。定义现代 PC 游戏的硬件，随时可以玩。

超过 1,000 个加速应用程序和游戏，数百万种使用方式

RTX 为您带来 AI、模拟和光线追踪方面的独特功能和最新进展。在专业人士、创作者和游戏玩家每天使用的应用程序、AI 工具和游戏中体验令人难以置信的 3D 性能、更流畅的视频编辑、逼真的模拟和令人惊叹的视觉效果。

在小型、超高效的桌面中获取 RTX Spark。专为在您的办公桌上 24/7 运行个人 AI 代理以及游戏，并利用 RTX 图形的全部功能进行创作。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
